data.title: China Yuchai Is a Great Choice for 'Trend' Investors, Here's Why
data.description: When it comes to short-term investing or trading, they say "the trend is your friend." And there's no denying that this is the most profitable strategy. But making sure of the sustainability of a trend to profit from it is easier said than done.
